title: ascocentrum miniatum
intro: Ascocentrum miniatum, also known as the miniature dendrobium orchid or the Ascocentrum orchid, is a type of flowering orchid plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ascocentrum miniatum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
